calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Real Property Is An Asset Of The Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3) & 856
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Sykes, via Zoom, for and with Gene Cornyn, Petitioner.

The court advises that it intends to take this matter under submission. The court and counsel confirm that the proposed order the court currently has is incorrect and counsel advises that she will submit a revised order.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
